description: Generate branded HTML slide decks from YAML config and JSON metrics using Jinja2 templates, a shared CSS theme, and a CLI.
rules: All dynamic data MUST come from metrics.json — never hardcode numbers or values in presentation.yaml
Use {{ metrics.path.to.value }} interpolation inside YAML string values to reference metrics
Available layouts: title, two-column, three-column, data-table, stat-grid, closing
Set theme.primary (background hex) and theme.accent (accent hex) in presentation.yaml — all CSS variants are auto-derived
Use FontAwesome icon names without 'fa-' prefix (e.g. icon: gem), except in closing layout info_items which use full FA classes
Use item['items'] bracket notation in templates to avoid Python dict .items() method clash
Zip command: pf zip --dir <slides-dir> to create shareable .zip
